source.section: Part 9 - Radar & Sensors > 3 - AN/AAQ-28(V) LITENING II Targeting Pod > 3.7 - Laser Marking

steps.action: Power up the Targeting Pod and set A/G Master Mode as per the previous Power-Up Procedure.
steps.voiced: Power up the targeting pod and select A/G Master Mode.

steps.action: Set LTD/R (Laser Target Designator/Ranger) switch to ARM. This will arm the laser. Confirm that L ARM indication is displayed on the FLIR page.
steps.voiced: Set LTD/R switch to ARM — confirm L ARM indication appears on the FLIR page.

steps.action: Press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the selected DDI (Right for the Right DDI as an example). The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the selected DDI — confirm Select Focus Diamond appears.

steps.action: Press the Undesignate button twice to select VVSLV mode.
steps.voiced: Press the Undesignate button twice to select VVSLV mode.

steps.action: Press the Undesignate button twice to select unselect VVSLV and switch to Snowplow mode.
steps.voiced: Press Undesignate twice again to deselect VVSLV and enter Snowplow mode.

steps.action: Use (Throttle Designator Controller) Aft/Fwd/Left/Right controls to slew the targeting pod reticle over the desired target
steps.voiced: Use TDC Aft/Fwd/Left/Right to slew the pod reticle over the target.

steps.action: Use the TDC DEPRESS control (“ENTER”) to designate target
steps.voiced: Press TDC DEPRESS to designate the target.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to “TRIG”. The indication will become boxed once selected, which means that a gun trigger press will fire the laser.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to TRIG — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to “MARK” to set the laser in “M Arm” (Marker Arm) mode. When selected, “Mark” indication will be boxed.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to MARK to arm the laser marker — confirm MARK boxes.

steps.action: Press and hold the gun trigger to fire laser. Once laser is firing, the laser mode will switch from M ARM to MARK.
steps.voiced: Press and hold gun trigger to fire laser — mode switches from M ARM to MARK.

steps.action: An infrared laser will be visible with your night vision goggles.
steps.voiced: Confirm infrared laser is visible through night vision goggles.
